feat.name: Hungry Eyes
feat.special: You can select this feat twice, once to gain low-light vision and a second time to gain darkvision.
feat.text: Your eyes can see through darkness with an oni’s visual acuity. You gain low-light vision, or you gain darkvision if you already have low-light vision.

traits.name: Hungerseed
traits.text: A name for those who have oni ancestry.
